purpose: Define what a later business package, endpoint recovery, external client or product decision must provide before any currently blocked production-module function can be promoted to PASS.

requirements.title: WOM visible manual production-task create or import entry is not exposed
targetTables: workflow/runtime task tables selected by recovered create flow
requiredEvidence: product-owner scope decision for manual create/import versus daily-plan creation
real-browser visible entry proof if the flow is in scope
API request and response with ADP_E2E marker
PostgreSQL before/after query proving wom_produce_tasks and workflow target writes
passCriteria: Product owner confirms the intended manufacturing-task creation entry.
If manual create/import is required, the real runtime/menu/button entry is visible and not a fake platform-only shortcut.
A marker create/import action writes the target PostgreSQL tables.
If out of scope, acceptance assets explicitly reclassify the action with product evidence.
nonSolutions: Do not mark manual create/import PASS from produceTaskCreated2 alone.
Do not expose a fake save button without product-confirmed payload and PostgreSQL marker proof.

requirements.title: public produceTaskCreated explicitly disabled pending product decision
targetTables: workflow/runtime task tables selected by restored implementation
requiredEvidence: product-owner supported-vs-deprecated decision
explicit disabled response remains documented if deprecated
API marker request and response if restored
PostgreSQL marker count proving zero writes for disabled behavior or real writes for restored behavior
passCriteria: The endpoint is either formally deprecated with explicit failure behavior, or restored as a supported integration contract.
If restored, a unique ADP_E2E marker writes wom_produce_tasks and required workflow tables.
produceTaskCreated2 evidence remains separate and is not used to pass this public endpoint.
nonSolutions: Do not mark HTTP 200/code 400 disabled behavior as functional PASS.
Do not count produceTaskCreated2 as proof that public produceTaskCreated works.

requirements.title: WOM makeTaskList QR code generation endpoint is missing
requiredPackages: WOM printManage / QR endpoint package or source module
targetTables: confirmed QR/print metadata table from recovered endpoint
requiredEvidence: real-browser toolbar click from makeTaskList
endpoint probes no longer return HTTP 404
request payload, response body and visible Chinese user feedback
PostgreSQL marker proof if QR or print metadata is persisted, otherwise NOT_APPLICABLE file/print evidence
passCriteria: The toolbar no longer calls missing 404 printManage endpoints.
A recovered WOM endpoint/package handles generateQrCode through the normal gateway path.
The browser flow records usable QR/file/print or PostgreSQL metadata evidence.
nonSolutions: Do not count opening the QR dialog shell as PASS while endpoints still return 404.
Do not seed printer rows alone without the missing endpoint implementation.

requirements.title: Batch formula visible manual edit entry requires external Batch client
frontendEntrypoints: batchFormulaEdit opened by real external client flow
apiEndpoints: Batch client driven save/submit endpoint captured during real flow
requiredEvidence: real external-client driven browser entry
WebSocket/ActiveX bridge evidence where applicable
API request and response with ADP_E2E marker
PostgreSQL marker query against RM formula and process/activity tables
recheckCommands: manual: provision external Batch client, trigger batchFormulaEdit, save with ADP_E2E marker and query RM target tables
passCriteria: The real external-client entry opens batchFormulaEdit.
The marker edit/save writes RM formula and process/activity tables.
Browser, API, backend and PostgreSQL evidence are added to acceptance reports.
nonSolutions: Do not add a fake list button that bypasses the vendor Batch client workflow.
Do not mark PASS from batch/sync import evidence alone.

requirements.title: QCS bad-quantity and material inventory write-back remain unresolved
requiredEvidence: material service package candidate scan
healthy Nacos prod material service
endpoint probes no longer return tenant-service 503
real-browser or authenticated API marker flow for the material boundary
product decision for standalone bad-quantity route/table if required
PostgreSQL marker write to confirmed stock-in or inventory table
recheckCommands: manual: run material checkProdResult/generateProduceOutSing marker flow and query target stock-in tables
passCriteria: The material service contract is READY.
Inventory or stock-in target tables are mapped.
A marker flow proves the material write-back boundary in PostgreSQL.
Standalone bad quantity is tested only after product/package evidence defines it.
nonSolutions: Do not treat QCS/WOM state backfill as inventory proof.
Do not invent a bad-quantity column without a recovered product route/table.

requirements.title: ProcessAnalysis traceability service is missing
requiredEvidence: ProcessAnalysis package candidate scan
healthy Nacos prod ProcessAnalysis service
runtime_view/menu/table counts greater than zero
real-browser WOM traceability button opens marker batch page
PostgreSQL runtime and target table query evidence
recheckCommands: manual: open processBatchViewOut from the real WOM trace button with ADP_E2E marker batch
passCriteria: The process-analysis contract is READY.
Traceability runtime/menu/table metadata is present.
Authenticated endpoints return successful responses instead of 503.
The real WOM trace button reaches the target page with marker data.
nonSolutions: Do not patch WOM alone and call traceability complete.
Do not use direct URL reachability without service registration and DB evidence.

requirements.title: Full report-work remains blocked at bad-quantity scope and material boundary
apiEndpoints: accepted WOM report-work endpoints remain regression coverage
targetTables: confirmed material stock-in or inventory table
requiredEvidence: accepted report-work subflows remain PASS
material service package candidate scan
healthy Nacos prod material service
real-browser or authenticated API marker flow for the material inventory boundary
PostgreSQL marker write to confirmed material table
product decision for standalone bad-quantity field/route/table if required
recheckCommands: manual: rerun accepted WOM report-work marker flows, then add material inventory marker acceptance
passCriteria: Existing report-work subflows still pass.
The material/inventory boundary is available and marker-tested.
Standalone bad quantity is accepted only after product/package evidence defines it.
nonSolutions: Do not infer inventory write-back from wom_check_records or QCS state backfill.
Do not force wom_mat_consum_recods rows with a database trigger for the current manual-putin path.

requirements.title: Material warehouse/inventory service package is missing
frontendEntrypoints: WOM/QCS stock-in or inventory write-back flow
requiredEvidence: material package candidate scan
healthy Nacos prod material service
controller/service/DAO/SQL trace
real-browser or authenticated API marker flow for stock-in or inventory write-back
PostgreSQL marker write to confirmed inventory or stock-in table
recheckCommands: manual: run checkProdResult/generateProduceOutSing marker flows and query material stock/inbound tables
passCriteria: The material-service contract is READY.
Target material tables are mapped.
Endpoint and PostgreSQL marker evidence prove the stock-in or inventory write.
nonSolutions: Do not treat BaseSet material master data or WOM internal material tables as material-service stock-in targets.
Do not mark PASS from HTTP 200 alone without database write proof.

requirements.title: Production list data export implementation is missing
apiEndpoints: target list query export endpoints recorded in metadata/production-export-gap-breakdown.json
requiredEvidence: product-owner export scope decision
real-browser visible export action for each required list
runtime layoutJson export action
backend source hook for list-data export
non-empty workbook file response with filename, status, size and sample content
PostgreSQL persistence marked NOT_APPLICABLE for file export
passCriteria: Required export scope is confirmed.
Each required list has visible runtime export action and backend source implementation.
Real browser/network evidence proves non-empty data workbook responses.
Acceptance records file response proof instead of pretending export persists rows.
nonSolutions: Do not accept empty HTTP 200 downloadXls responses as data export.
Do not confuse import-template download with list-data export.
